headline: Why The Narrative Around Cardinal Health (CAH) Is Shifting With New Targets And Guidance
summary: Cardinal Health's modeled fair value has been nudged from US$249.27 to US$249.60, a small shift that still matters if you are tracking the stock through analyst targets. Much of the recent research behind this move ties the updated price target range, roughly US$240 to US$258, to recurring commentary about consistent execution and confidence in the core and specialty businesses. Read on to see how to interpret these target changes and keep up with the evolving analyst narrative around...

headline: PLSE Accelerates Cardiac Catheter Program After Breakthrough AFib Data

headline: PacBio Wins Basecamp Research Deal for Trillion Gene Atlas Initiative

headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks with Competitive Advantages and 1 We Brush Off
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.

headline: Cardinal Health (CAH) Appoints New Chair as Gregory Kenny Steps Down
summary: Cardinal Health, Inc. (NYSE:CAH) is included among the Dividend Kings and Aristocrats List: 32 Biggest Stocks. On March 23, Cardinal Health, Inc. (NYSE:CAH) named Patricia A. Hemingway Hall as Chair of the Board, replacing Gregory B. Kenny following his retirement. The change is effective immediately. Kenny had been with the Board since 2007 and took […]
